case_title: RUSSELL DAVIS VS. NICHOLAS STENTON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1221 PLYMOUTH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL SERVED NOV-20-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $116.67 PER DAY AND THE ORIGINAL LEASE IS NO LONGER AVAILABLE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT STENTON, NICHOLAS
